TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u tademaw namakahekal ku sakatineng tu. tuud amin, hakya walu a bataan a palasubu (80%) wai pabaw henay kunikadihan,tada u mata kusapi aadih kuyadahay, u mata hananay unu likat akuhak, nuhhekal a tineng masasing pataynin i sapiadih nu mata mamin pataynin i punu', sakasaan makadih ku tademaw tu tuud, umata nu tademaw atu punu' kuma tinengay tu wayway kumi laheciay, ukikay atanu demaw asaka tineng nu pyakpunu' atu sapi sasinng ani laaciyan, malamata kusapi sassing,
S.PHON: u tad…ômaw namakańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sakatin…ôŇč tu. tuud amin, ńßakja war~…ĺu a bataan a par~…ĺasubu (**%) wai pabaw ńß…ônaj kunikadińßan,tada u mata kusapi aadińß kujadańßaj, u mata ńßananaj unu r~…ĺikat akuńßak, nuńßńß…ôkar~…ĺ a tin…ôŇč masasiŇč patajnin i sapiadińß nu mata mamin patajnin i punu Ē~ °, sakasaan makadińß ku tad…ômaw tu tuud, umata nu tad…ômaw atu punu Ē~ ° kuma tin…ôŇčaj tu wajwaj kumi r~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj, ukikaj atanu d…ômaw asaka tin…ôŇč nu pjakpunu Ē~ ° atu sapi sasinŇč ani r~…ĺaa ¶ijan, mar~…ĺamata kusapi sassiŇč,
S.FORM: u tademaw namakahekal ku sakatineng tu. tuud amin, hakya walu a bataan a palasubu (80%) wai pabaw henay kunikadihan,tada u mata kusapi aadih kuyadahay, u mata hananay unu likat akuhak, nuhhekal a tineng masasing pataynin i sapiadih nu mata mamin pataynin i punu', sakasaan makadih ku tademaw tu tuud, umata nu tademaw atu punu' kuma tinengay tu wayway kumi laheciay, ukikay atanu demaw asaka tineng nu pyakpunu' atu sapi sasinng ani laaciyan, malamata kusapi sassing,
S.PHON: u tad…ômaw namakańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku sakatin…ôŇč tu. tuud amin, ńßakja war~…ĺu a bataan a par~…ĺasubu (**%) wai pabaw ńß…ônaj kunikadińßan,tada u mata kusapi aadińß kujadańßaj, u mata ńßananaj unu r~…ĺikat akuńßak, nuńßńß…ôkar~…ĺ a tin…ôŇč masasiŇč patajnin i sapiadińß nu mata mamin patajnin i punu Ē~ °, sakasaan makadińß ku tad…ômaw tu tuud, umata nu tad…ômaw atu punu Ē~ ° kuma tin…ôŇčaj tu wajwaj kumi r~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj, ukikaj atanu d…ômaw asaka tin…ôŇč nu pjakpunu Ē~ ° atu sapi sasinŇč ani r~…ĺaa ¶ijan, mar~…ĺamata kusapi sassiŇč,
